files.content:
---
import type { HTMLAttributes } from "astro/types"

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

type Props = HTMLAttributes<"div"> & HTMLAttributes<"a">

const { class: className, href, ...props } = Astro.props

const Comp = href ? "a" : "div"
---

<Comp
  class={cn(
    "flex items-center justify-start gap-2.5 text-base font-semibold whitespace-nowrap",
    className
  )}
  href={href}
  {...props}
>
  <slot />
</Comp>
--- import type { HTMLAttributes } from "astro/types" import { cn } from "@/lib/utils" type Props = HTMLAttributes<"span"> const { class: className, ...props } = Astro.props ---

export { default as Logo } from "./logo.astro"
export { default as LogoImage } from "./logo-image.astro"
export { default as LogoText } from "./logo-text.astro"
